feed.title: Chaput
feed.subtitle: Official product guides for Chaput, a profile-first social app where conversations can become content when privacy settings allow.

entry.title: What is Chaput?
entry.summary: Learn how Chaput turns one intentional first message into a conversation that can grow on a profile tree.

entry.title: How Chaput works
entry.summary: Follow the Chaput flow from profile discovery and an opening message to replies, archives, Revive and privacy controls.

entry.title: Conversation-led ideas for creators
entry.summary: Explore responsible ways for dialogue, commentary, reaction and writing creators to learn from conversation patterns.

entry.title: Goth and alternative community on Chaput
entry.summary: Discover profile-first connections for goth and alternative people with clear expectations around respect, privacy and safety.
